description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline, half sleeves, and multi-coloured graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Flaunt your love and dedication to the god of clothing - lee - in this multi-coloured split graphic print t-shirt from lee. The "HO-LEE" wordings is the perfect cowboy cheer for the company that has been creating some of the best durable and comfortable wear for over a century now. Team this tee with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
